Off Calendar Oct-24-2012 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-03-2012 Continued To Oct-24-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1657-1661 Oak Street S.F.)
Off Calendar Apr-02-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Schultz for Tom Lucas (Administrator W/WA).

Bid is increased to $1,272.000.00. The sale is confirmed based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to receipt of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $1,223,000.00 is required.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jun-03-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Schultz for Thomas Lucas (Proposed Administrator).

Mr. Schultz stated that Dixie Jackson Taylor died March 8, 2011, that she post-deceased Emmett Stanley Thompson, that she was Mr. Thompson's Niece, that he spoke with Dixie's Sister Mayra Hollund several times (also a Niece of Decedent), that Mayra told them that Dixie's estate was less than $100,000.00 in cash at the time of her death and that there are no probate proceedings in North Carolina for her estate. The Court dispensed with notice to James Dean Steele. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Chien.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar May-11-2011 Continued To May-25-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
